title: cupheanthus toninensis
intro: Cupheanthus tonkinensis, also known as the Vietnamese rose, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cupheanthus tonkinensis include the potential treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine.
